title: ceratocephalus
intro: Ceratocephalus ferox, commonly known as the spiny-headed fumewort or toothwort, is a perennial plant in the barberry family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing antioxidant properties. Ceratocephalus ferox can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
